title: Victory report from Ivory Coast - June/July 2023
summary: “And when they were come, and had gathered the church together, they rehearsed all that God had done with them, and how he had opened the door of faith unto the Gentiles.” (Act 14:27) The good Lord Jesus enabled us to travel to the Ivory Coast from the 28th of June to the 7th of July, 2023. Bishop Efrem of the UK has long been encouraging me to travel to the Ivory Coast and we were excited to see what the Lord would do. As soon as Bishop Efrem exited the airport in Abidjan the capital of Ivory Coast, the Lord Jesus confirmed the trip was ordained for his glory. As you can see in Figure 1, a few young men who were total strangers, approached him and the leader of Ivory Coast, Brother Jean Baptiste, and asked for prayers upon their knees. Having lived in France for some years, Brother Efrem’s French was a much-needed asset as few people speak English in the Ivory Coast. It always amazes us how the Lord prepares his servants years in advance for his purposes. “But rise, and stand upon thy feet: for I have appeared unto thee for this purpose, to make thee a minister and a witness both of these things which thou hast seen, and of those things in the which I will appear unto thee” (Acts 26:16).
